member_long_descriptions: Right-edge crop of a dark brown wooden wall-mounted picture frame with a narrow-to-medium molded profile and a thin gold inner trim, holding a sailboat print; frame corner is visible and slightly worn, partially cut off by the image edge. Approximate camera distance ~1.0 m.

White plastic dual-socket wall outlet with two vertical rectangular receptacles and a centered mounting screw; faceplate fills most of the crop, shows light surface smudging and minor scuffing, wall-mounted and viewed from close distance (approximately 0.4 m from camera).

Partial close-up of an off-white to light-gray picture frame edge with a narrow, smooth molding and faint vertical banding; the object is edge-cropped and slightly blurred, appearing very close to the camera (approx. 0.3 m).

White plastic dual-gang outlet/switch plate with two vertical rectangular modules, surface-mounted and slightly shadowed; the object is partially cut off at the crop edge and appears close to the camera (≈0.6 m).

Partial dark brown wooden picture frame with a slightly worn, scuffed finish and thin gilded inner trim, visible along the left and bottom edges of the crop surrounding a muted seascape print of sailboats; frame shows beveled molding and is edge-cropped (estimated distance ~0.7 m).

White rectangular plastic picture-frame-like unit with a dark rectangular central inset resembling a screen or photo area, two small round button markings along the lower front, slightly blurred/low-resolution appearance; the object fills most of the crop and appears wall-mounted and about 0.5 m from the camera.
